title: taraxacum limosicola
intro: Taraxacum limosicola, also known as the narrow-leaved dandelion, is a plant species belonging to the dandelion family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds that may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Taraxacum limosicola are thought to include the support of liver health, the improvement of digestion, and the reduction of blood pressure. Taraxacum limosicola is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is sometimes consumed as a coffee substitute or used as a food ingredient in salads and sautés.
